name: Quick French Onion Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Thinly slice the onions and cheese.
2. Cut the bread into 1-inch slices and toast.
3. In a Dutch oven, cook the onions and sugar in hot oil over medium heat for 15 to 20 minutes or until deep golden brown, stirring frequently to prevent burning.
4. Slowly add the broth and pepper; bring to a boil. Reduce heat, cover, and cook slowly for 20 minutes.
5. Ladle into a serving container or individual ovenproof bowls.
6. Place bread slices on top and add cheese.
7. Under the broiler, 3 to 4 inches from the heat, and cook for 3 to 5 minutes until the cheese is hot and bubbly.
